d:
Passive. When Ulmus' HP ratio drops below [[30%]] for the first time, he retreats to the backline and takes root to recover [[30%]]<HP> HP. While rooted, Ulmus is [[unaffected]] and unable to move. His normal attacks become ranged and deal an additional [[50%]] damage to enemies surrounding the primary target.
Active. Ulmus attacks an enemy, knocking the target and adjacent enemies into the air, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage plus an extra [[4%]]<HP> damage. This skill prioritizes the area with the most enemies within his attack range.
Increases the damage dealt to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Ulmus gains a [[25%]]<HP> shield that lasts [[10]]s. When the shield breaks, it deals [[160%]]<ATK> damage to surrounding enemies. If Ulmus is rooted, he will grant the shield to the [[frontmost]] ally instead.
Increases the shield value to [[28%]]<HP>.
Increases the shield value to [[32%]]<HP>.
Increases the shield value to [[35%]]<HP>.
Passive. Ulmus recovers [[3.5%]] of his lost HP per second. When rooted, he will instead recover [[30]] Energy per second.
Increases the HP recovered per second to [[4%]], or the Energy recovered to [[32]].
Increases the HP recovered per second to [[4.5%]], or the Energy recovered to [[34]].
Increases the HP recovered per second to [[5%]], or the Energy recovered to [[36]].
Increases max HP by [[17%]] during battle.
Increases max HP by [[23%]] during battle.
Increases max HP by [[29%]] during battle.

Ulmus extends his roots to trap vulnerable enemies on the battlefield. Whenever an enemy target is knocked down, knocked into the air or affected by other displacement effects, Ulmus binds the target to the ground, increasing the knockdown duration by [[2]]s and dealing [[80%]]<ATK> damage. This effect can only affect the same enemy once every [[10]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[100%]].
Gains [[60]] Life Drain when dealing damage with this skill.
Increases the damage dealt to [[120%]].
Ulmus knocks back adjacent enemies by 1 tile when the shield granted by Verdant Barrier breaks or vanishes.
